user_query:
You're my SAT prep coach. Please read my files in input/: profile.json, diagnostic.json, practice_log.json, college_list.json, and feedback.md. Based on these, create the following deliverables:

1) output/study_plan.md — An 8-week SAT plan tailored to my data. Include: (a) a brief diagnostic summary, (b) the top two weak domains explicitly named and how you'll address them, (c) weekly schedule that fits my availability while honoring "No study on Sundays" and "Max session length: 90 minutes", (d) digital SAT module strategy and timed practice requirements, and (e) a superscoring strategy with 2–3 test dates.

2) output/progress.json — Initialize a tracker with keys: score_history (array with my baseline), section_accuracy (object with "Reading & Writing" and "Math" domain breakdown placeholders), mistakes_log (empty array seeded with the fields you'll track), and prediction (object with a range and confidence string). Keep it valid JSON.

3) output/tasks.json — A prioritized 2-week task list (at least 8 tasks) that operationalizes the plan: each item must include id (int), text (string), priority (high|medium|low), status (pending), and due (YYYY-MM-DD). Ensure due dates avoid Sundays and tasks reflect sessions no longer than 90 minutes.

4) output/reminders.json — A set of at least 3 reminders for key study sessions and practice tests aligned to the plan, with objects containing: id (string), task (string), date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM), and status (pending). Ensure no reminders fall on Sundays.

5) output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md — Add a structured learning entry capturing how my feedback in input/feedback.md changed your assumptions (e.g., "No study on Sundays" and "Max session length: 90 minutes"). Use a header like "## [LRN-YYYYMMDD-XXX] correction" and include Logged timestamp, Priority, Status, Area, a Summary, Details, Suggested Action, and a Metadata block.

Please keep all file writes under output/, use only the provided input files, and do not rely on any external resources.
